meaning: extra high voltage[电]极高压,超高压
examples: Modern EHV arresters must be capable of discharging these high-energy switching surges.
This paper presents a new method for finding the trouble location of EHV transmission lines.
This paper studies closing overvoltage on unloaded line in EHV power system by means of digital computer.
EHV-1 can be transmitted through the air from respiratory infection or by close contact between horses and although it can be treated, in some cases it can be fatal.
